old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-pspk","title":"puck coap: inconsistent LOCATION conditional vs unconditional linker sections","description":"In commit 98fdb500, lichen/apps/puck/CMakeLists.txt keeps the coap_resource_lichen_coap iterable_section inside if(CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_LOCATION) but moved zephyr_linker_sources(DATA_SECTIONS sections-ram.ld) and the new coap_resource_lichen_coap_server section outside. This creates mismatch with sections-ram.ld:6 which always includes the location section, and differs from gateway/CMakeLists.txt and test patterns. May pull in unwanted resources or fail to register in some configs. Unverified on T-Echo hardware.
